With hope in their hearts, these remarkable racers take to 
the track today. Who among them will go down in Derby 
history?

They're all in the starting gate. And the Tokyo 
Yushun — the Japanese Derby… begins!

Biwa Hayahide starts strong, going straight for the front of 
the pack. Narita Taishin is waiting it out behind.

And Winning Ticket is slightly behind the middle of the 
pack. The three most popular racers are each in their 
position of strength.

Taishin, Hayahide and I… know each other so well, our 
usual tricks are pointless.
So all there is to do is run with all I've got!
They're in the backstretch, spread far from front to back.

The front pack is at the third corner! All eyes are on BNW, 
eager to see how this race will unfold!

I've had this dream since I was little, but now I'm friends 
with Hayahide and Taishin, I have a trainer, and I'm 
running in the Derby…
This is the real Derby. I've watched so many of them, but this is different. This is our Derby.

They're past the big zelkova tree and picking up speed! In 
moments they'll reach renown at the finish line!

I want to win… I only have this one chance at the Derby! 
I've always dreamed about this Derby! I want to WIN OUR 
DERBY!
Don't fail me now, leeeeegs!

Winning Ticket makes a huge dash right into the 
homestretch! She's on the inside, leaping to the front!
Haaaaagh!
I won't looose!

Biwa Hayahide and Narita Taishin are shortening the 
distance between them and Winning Ticket! This is it, the 
BNW trio! But who will win?!
URRRAAAAAGH!
I'm gonna be… DERBY CHAMPIOOON!

She made it! Winning Ticket takes the lead! It's Winning 
Ticket!
Winning Ticket passes the finish line!
The winner of the Derby is Winning Ticket!
Huff… Huff… Huff…
Wow…
Ahhh!
